howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Copy any video link from YouTube, Facebook, TikTok or 200+ other platforms and paste it into the input above.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Select your preferred format — MP4, MP3, FLAC, SRT — and the quality level that suits your needs. Video, audio, thumbnails, and transcripts available.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Click Download and your file is processed and delivered in seconds. No account required.

platforms.title: 200+ Supported Platforms
platforms.desc: From YouTube to niche platforms. If there's a video, we can fetch it.

speed.title: Blazing Fast Processing
speed.desc: Server-side conversion with CDN delivery. Your download starts in under 3 seconds.

security.title: Private & Secure
security.desc: We don't store your URLs or files. Everything is processed ephemerally and deleted immediately.

quality.title: Any Quality, Any Format
quality.desc: 4K, 1080p, 720p video. Lossless FLAC and 320 kbps MP3 audio. PNG and WebP thumbnails. SRT, VTT, TXT, and JSON transcripts.

queue.title: No Queue, No Wait
queue.desc: Pro plans process in parallel. No waiting in line — start the next download immediately.

batch.title: Batch Downloads
batch.desc: Download entire playlists or channels in one click with our Pro and Team plans.

items.name: Alex Chen
items.text: This tool saves me hours every week. The 4K downloads are pristine and the batch processing is a game-changer.

items.name: Sarah Miller
items.text: I manage 12 brand accounts and DownForge handles all my video needs. The FLAC audio quality is incredible.

items.name: Marcus Johnson
items.text: The range of formats and resolutions is unmatched. Being able to pull lossless audio from any platform is essential for my workflow.

pro.name: Pro
features: All formats incl. FLAC, WebP & SRT

Auth.signInSubtitle: Sign in to your DownForge account

ApiDisclaimer.title: API Disclaimer
ApiDisclaimer.subtitle: Important information about our API usage policies.

fairUse.title: 1. Fair Use Policy
fairUse.body: Our API is provided under a fair use policy. Free tier users are limited to 1,000 requests per day. Pro and Team tiers have higher limits as specified in your plan. Excessive usage that disrupts service for other users may result in rate limiting or temporary suspension.

noWarranty.title: 2. No Warranty
noWarranty.body: The API is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability, accuracy of metadata, or compatibility with all video platforms. Platform APIs change frequently, and we cannot guarantee that all sources will remain accessible.

legal.title: 3. Legal Compliance
legal.body: You are responsible for ensuring your use of the API complies with applicable laws and the terms of service of any platform you access through our service. Downloading copyrighted content without permission may violate copyright laws in your jurisdiction.

dataRetention.title: 4. Data Retention
dataRetention.body: We do not store downloaded files permanently. Files are automatically deleted from our servers within 60 minutes of download. Metadata and usage logs may be retained for analytics and billing purposes.

rateLimits.title: 5. Rate Limits
rateLimits.body: API endpoints are subject to rate limiting: 60 requests per minute globally, 30 per minute for info endpoints, and 20 per minute for download endpoints. Exceeding these limits will result in HTTP 429 responses.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.section1Body: We collect only the information necessary to provide our service: the URLs you submit for download, your IP address for rate limiting, and account information (email, name) if you create an account. We do not collect or store the actual content of your downloads beyond the processing period.
Privacy.section2Body: URLs are used solely to process your download request and are deleted from our servers immediately after processing. Account information is used for authentication, billing, and communication about your account. We do not sell, trade, or share your personal data with third parties.
Privacy.section3Body: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS), secure API authentication, and regular security audits. Downloaded files are stored temporarily in isolated storage and automatically purged.
Privacy.section4Body: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. Analytics cookies are used only with your consent. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings.
Privacy.section5Body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data at any time. Contact us at privacy@downforge.me to exercise these rights. We will respond to your request within 30 days.

Pricing.title: Pricing Plans
Pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Start free, upgrade when you need more.
Pricing.faq1Q: Can I switch plans at any time?
Pricing.faq1A: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
Pricing.faq2Q: What payment methods do you accept?
Pricing.faq2A: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and cryptocurrency.
Pricing.faq3Q: Is there a free trial for Pro?
Pricing.faq3A: Yes, we offer a 7-day free trial of our Pro plan with no commitment required.
Pricing.faq4A: Absolutely. No contracts, no cancellation fees. Your access continues until the end of the billing period.
